ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of the school (e.g., Charter, District) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "total_budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the school belongs to (for district schools) */,
  "charter_network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charter network the school belongs to (for charter schools) */,
  "enrollment_dates" TEXT /* Academic year or term for which the enrollment data is recorded */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers in the school */,
  "teacher_student_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of teachers to students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the metrics belong to */,
  "average_math_score" TEXT /* Average math score for the school */,
  "average_reading_score" TEXT /* Average reading score for the school */,
  "percent_passing_math" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "percent_passing_reading" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "percent_overall_passing" TEXT /* Overall percentage of students passing both math and reading */,
  "metric_year" TEXT /* Academic year or term for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "average_science_score" TEXT /* Average science score for the school */,
  "percent_passing_science" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing science */,
  "average_social_studies_score" TEXT /* Average social studies score for the school */,
  "percent_passing_social_studies" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing social studies */,
  "average_gpa" TEXT /* Average GPA of students */,
  "graduation_rate" TEXT /* Graduation rate of the school */,
  "dropout_rate" TEXT /* Dropout rate of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, school staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
